description: Utility-family role that takes unstructured intent and emits a structured Mission+Sprint proposal JSON. Pinned to specialist-tier MODEL (35B per #203) because mission planning is judgment-bearing strategy work — but the BEHAVIOR shape is bounded-I/O (read inputs, emit one structured output, no multi-turn agent loop with side-effecting tools). `role_family` controls whether the agent-loop preamble applies; mission-compiler is `role_family: utility` — the model is big, the work shape is bounded.
